label: Register Application
desc: Call POST /applications with 10 declared fields. Returns application_id, tier assignment, and required OTEL config.
appRequirement: Implement one-time REST call at app startup or deployment pipeline.
dataFormat: JSON payload: name, ai_system_type, deployment_domain, decision_type, autonomy_level, population_breadth, affected_populations, consent_scope, owner_email, division_id

label: Install OTEL SDK
desc: Install OpenTelemetry SDK and OTLP exporter. Required for all metric channels.
appRequirement: Add OTEL packages to your app dependencies.

label: Set Resource Attributes
desc: 5 mandatory attributes on every OTEL export batch. Platform drops any batch missing these.
appRequirement: Configure OTEL resource with all 5 attributes before app starts.

label: Point to Collector
desc: Configure OTLP exporter to send metrics to the governance collector endpoint.
appRequirement: Set GOVERNANCE_COLLECTOR_URL environment variable. Configure OTLP HTTP exporter.

label: Production Env Flag
desc: Platform only ingests metrics where deployment.environment=production. All other environments are silently dropped.
appRequirement: Set deployment.environment=production in production only. Never emit production flag in dev/staging.
codeHint:
# Set via environment variable
GOVERNANCE_ENV=production  # production only

label: Emit Core Metrics (8)
desc: 8 baseline metrics required from all apps. Minimum for KPI calculator to produce results.
appRequirement: Instrument every AI inference call. Track errors, latency, accuracy, drift, data quality, bias, disclosure.
dataFormat: Gauge metrics emitted after each request batch

label: Error Rate Tracking
desc: Track ratio of failed AI requests to total requests.
appRequirement: Wrap every AI call in try/except. Track exception count vs total calls.
dataFormat: Gauge float 0–1. Emit after each request or on a 30s timer.

label: Latency P95 Tracking
desc: Track 95th percentile end-to-end latency of AI inference calls.
appRequirement: Time every AI inference call. Calculate p95 over a rolling window (e.g. last 100 requests).
codeHint:
import numpy as np
latencies.append(elapsed_ms)
p95 = np.percentile(latencies[-100:], 95)

label: Model Accuracy
desc: Track model accuracy from user feedback or ground-truth evaluation.
appRequirement: Implement one of: (a) user thumbs-up/down feedback system, (b) ground-truth evaluation loop, (c) LLM-as-judge scoring.

label: Hallucination Rate
desc: Track rate of hallucinated or ungrounded responses.
appRequirement: MUST implement hallucination detection. Options: LLM-as-judge, confidence scoring, factual grounding check against retrieved context.
codeHint:
# LLM-as-judge approach
verification = llm.invoke(f"Is this answer grounded in the context? {answer} Context: {context}")
is_hallucination = "no" in verification.lower()

label: Drift Score
desc: Track distribution shift in model inputs/outputs over time.
appRequirement: MUST implement drift detection. Options: cosine distance between current embedding distribution and baseline, KS test, feature drift monitoring.
codeHint:
from scipy.spatial.distance import cosine
drift = cosine(current_embedding_mean, baseline_embedding_mean)

label: RAG Citation Coverage
desc: Track what percentage of answer claims have a source citation.
appRequirement: RAG apps only. Track whether each answer includes source citations. Requires structured answer format with sources list.

label: RAG Retrieval Latency
desc: Track P95 latency of the retrieval step separately from LLM generation.
appRequirement: Instrument the retrieval call separately from the LLM call.
codeHint:
start = time.time()
chunks = search_index.query(embedding)
retrieval_ms = (time.time() - start) * 1000

label: Data Quality Score
desc: Track quality of data flowing through the AI pipeline.
appRequirement: MUST implement data quality scoring. Options: relevance score from vector search results, completeness check, schema validation pass rate.
codeHint: quality = avg([hit.score for hit in search_results])

label: Bias Score
desc: Track statistical bias in model outputs.
appRequirement: MUST implement bias detection. Options: ML-based classifier on outputs, statistical parity check, embedding-based bias test.

label: Fairness — Demographic Parity
desc: Track equality of positive outcome rates across demographic groups.
appRequirement: ⚠️ REQUIRES demographic data capture — ensure privacy controls and user consent are in place. Track outcome rates by group.

label: Fairness — Disparate Impact
desc: Track ratio of positive outcome rates between most and least advantaged groups.
appRequirement: ⚠️ Same demographic tracking requirement as Demographic Parity.

label: Adversarial Query Detection
desc: Track rate of detected adversarial or injection attack attempts.
appRequirement: MUST implement adversarial/injection detection. Options: LLM classifier, regex patterns, semantic similarity to known attack patterns.

label: Human Override Rate
desc: Track rate at which humans correct or override AI outputs.
appRequirement: MUST implement human feedback UI. ⚠️ If override_rate < 0.001 and autonomy_level=human_in_the_loop, platform automatically elevates tier to High.

label: Human Review Coverage
desc: Track percentage of AI outputs that received human review.
appRequirement: Track how many responses were reviewed by a human vs total responses.

label: Override Event Emission
desc: Emit a governance event every time a human overrides an AI output.
appRequirement: MUST implement human feedback UI. Emit event to governance-event-collector (port 8001) on every override.
dataFormat: OTEL custom event: { query_id, original_answer, corrected_answer, user_id, timestamp }
codeHint:
# Separate exporter for events — port 8001
event_exporter = OTLPLogExporter(endpoint="http://collector:8001")
logger.emit({
  "governance.event": "governance.oversight.override",
  "query_id": query_id,
  "user_id": user_id
})

label: PII Detection Rate
desc: Track rate of PII detected in user queries before LLM processing.
appRequirement: MUST integrate a PII detection service. Any vendor: Azure Language Services, AWS Comprehend, Google DLP, Presidio (open source).

label: Consent Compliance Rate
desc: Track percentage of data processing operations backed by explicit user consent.
appRequirement: MUST implement consent tracking — record whether user consented before each request.

label: Injection Detection Rate
desc: Track rate of detected prompt injection attempts.
appRequirement: MUST implement prompt injection detection. Options: LLM classifier, regex-based patterns, semantic similarity to known injections.

label: Auth Failure Rate
desc: Track authentication failure rate to detect unauthorized access attempts.
appRequirement: Track failed authentication attempts vs total auth attempts.

label: Transparency Disclosure Rate
desc: Track percentage of responses that include source attribution to users.
appRequirement: Track what % of responses returned to users include source attribution. If your app always includes sources, emit 100.0.

label: Cost Per Query
desc: Track actual LLM API cost per request for FinOps governance.
appRequirement: Parse cost from LLM API response. Multiply token counts by current price per token.

label: Token Usage Rate
desc: Track token consumption rate for cost forecasting.
appRequirement: Count tokens from LLM API response. Track as rolling rate per minute.

label: Compute Cost Hourly
desc: Track infrastructure compute cost per hour.
appRequirement: Integrate with cloud provider cost API: Azure Cost Management, AWS Cost Explorer, or GCP Cloud Billing.

label: Cache Hit Rate
desc: Track semantic cache hit rate to measure cost reduction from caching.
appRequirement: Requires a caching layer in your app (Redis, Memcached, or in-memory).

label: Override Event
desc: Emit event when human overrides AI output. Primary signal for Human Oversight KPI.
appRequirement: Human feedback UI required. Emit to event collector port 8001.
dataFormat: OTEL log event: { query_id, original_answer, user_id, timestamp }

label: Appeal Submitted Event
desc: Emit event when user submits a formal appeal of an AI decision.
appRequirement: MUST implement an appeals workflow. Only required for binding/high-stakes decision apps.
dataFormat: OTEL log event: { appeal_id, decision_id, user_id, reason, timestamp }

label: Appeal Resolved Event
desc: Emit event when an appeal is resolved.
appRequirement: Same appeals workflow as E2. Track resolution outcome.
dataFormat: OTEL log event: { appeal_id, resolution, resolved_by, timestamp }

label: Fairness Test Result Event
desc: Emit event after running a periodic bias/fairness test.
appRequirement: MUST implement periodic fairness testing pipeline. Run at defined intervals or after model updates.
dataFormat: OTEL log event: { test_id, test_type, score, passed, timestamp }

label: Risk Register Event
desc: Emit event when a risk register entry is created or updated.
appRequirement: MUST define risk events in your app. Emit on each risk trigger.
dataFormat: OTEL log event: { risk_id, risk_type, severity, timestamp }

label: Incident Reporting
desc: Track AI system incidents — failures, anomalies, and safety events.
appRequirement: MUST define what constitutes an incident. Implement incident classification, logging, and timestamp tracking.
dataFormat: Counter int (incident count) + Gauge float (MTTD in minutes).

label: Risk Monitoring
desc: Track risk events and score changes over time.
appRequirement: MUST define risk events in your app. Track your app's internal risk score if you have one.

label: Appeals Tracking
desc: Track appeal submission and resolution rates.
appRequirement: MUST implement appeals workflow (UI + backend). Track submission rate and time to resolution.
dataFormat: Gauge float ratio + Gauge float hours.

label: MCP Agent Integration
desc: Allow AI agents (Claude, GPT, custom) to query your governance catalog via MCP protocol.
appRequirement: No code changes to your app required. Configure your AI agent with MCP server URL and OAuth credentials.
dataFormat: MCP protocol — agent calls governance.read-scoped tools
